The Pingtung County Fire Department reports that a massive explosion occurred during the firefighting efforts. Additionally, there were significant amount of flammable materials such as plastic pellets and rubber inside the factory. However, after the amendment of the  Services Act in 2019, any factory management is mandated to provide chemical inventory, site plans, and other necessary information during a fire incident, as well as designate personnel to assist in disaster relief. The question arises as to why this incident still resulted in such severe casualties, and a thorough investigation is imperative to determine accountability. I pledge that if elected as the president, I will support the  of firefighters' unions and a fully implement the  Safety and Health Act.
